then.suggest: A court time like this without AM/PM is almost always PM — confirm 'Check here if you would like the clerk to also call you with your scheduled time please note that the clerk may' is PM, not AM.

rules.message: 'Check here if you would like the clerk to also call you with your scheduled time please note that the clerk may' looks like an early-hour time with no AM/PM; court times are almost always PM — confirm.
